    SELECT TOP(1) [b].[Id], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[EndDate], [b].[IsActive], [b].[IsDeleted], [b].[Name], [b].[Period], [b].[StartDate], [b].[TotalAmount], [b].[UpdatedAt], [b].[UserId]
    FROM [Budgets] AS [b]
    WHERE [b].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [b].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [b].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
) AS [b1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b0].[Id], [b0].[BudgetId], [b0].[CategoryId], [b0].[IsIncome], [b0].[IsSystemCategory], [b0].[LimitAmount], [c0].[Id] AS [Id0], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[Icon], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[Type], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UserId]

) AS [s] ON [b1].[Id] = [s].[BudgetId]
ORDER BY [b1].[Id], [s].[Id]
